title: tongoloa dunnii
intro: Tongoloa dunnii is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Tongoloa dunnii are attributed to its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional remedies to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
